transcript.text:
(One late night in Gwangju...)
(Came to eat a light(?) snack...) It's a small late-night snack
(Suspicious big eater...)
(Her simple late-night snack) (Kimchi stew and pork belly)
(And the biggest reactions...)
She can finish all this?????
(Sigh...)
That ain't gonna be easy!!!!
(The highest record here is 3 servings...)
Is that real?????
(The one that put Gwangju in a total surprise) Her belly is so flat, I saw it
(The starving big eater...)
(The day of eating with some spooky stories...)
(One pitch dark night...)
Hello, everyone
I'm in Gwangju today

It's about 10 at night now
And I'm here for a late-night snack cuz I'm starving
(Today's restaurant!) This place is open for 24 hours
Apparently it's a popular place in this neighborhood
(Booze party again...) It's time to have some soju, isn't it?
(I'm hungry, so let's get in!) I'll just have a light meal since it's late
(Located in Dong-gu, Gwangju, Jeolla Province) This is the 'Geumsung Restaurant'
(Geumsung Restaurant)
You're Tzuyang, right?!
(The person on the street recognized her!) Oh, yes I am
- Can I take a picture with you? - Sure!
(Happy even before entering the restaurant) Thank you, enjoy your meal!
(Entering) Hello
Oh, you're so pretty!
Oh, thank you
This place has been around for over 30 years!

Over 30 years?
(Continuing her mother's restaurant) Before that, my mom owned it
(The current 2nd generation owner) And now I run the business...
It's been 12 years
How many servings is one pot of kimchi stew?
There are servings for two and three
and also for four people
Then...
I'll have 2 servings of kimchi stew
and 10 servings of pork belly, please
10 servings...?
Amazing
(Order complete!) Thank you
(The kimchi stew came right away!) Thank you
Wow, looks delicious!
Smells awesome

(Calls for soju...) This will go perfect with soju
Me too
(LOLOL)
Aren't you bossing me around too much today?!
I didn't even eat one meal yet!!
Oh yeah...!
(The producer was busy the whole day) Now I think about it, that's true
(You know how I feel, right?) I'm sorry
(Stay tuned to see the producer go wild soon...!)
(Tasting the side dishes)
(A handful of ssamjang) Take a look at this ssamjang* *Red chili and soybean paste
It's delicious
All the side dishes are also delicious
Get rid of the onions
Wow, that's a lot of meat
Is it whole kimchi?!?!

(Make some noise) Wow, they use whole kimchi
(10 servings of pork belly) Wow, thank you
(and the grill is here!) Thank you
Wow, that's a lot of meat...!
(Looks delicious at first sight) My favorite pork belly is the thick and fatty ones
(Thick, hearty pork belly!) The portion is really large
(It looks like 10 more servings) I think it'll weigh more than 2kg
Let's taste the soup
It's amazing
This tastes exactly like...
the one that my grandmother or mom made at home
The one made with the taste of kimchi
The delicious taste of really good aged kimchi
Wow, it's so good
(Pat on the back for finding this great place...) It was a great idea to come here, it's so good
It's so crazy good x2!!

Wow... I'm not kidding...
(Time to grill some pork belly!) I think I can put it on now
It's starting to sizzle
(The sound of grilling meat that's always great...)
(She's going to fill up the whole grill...)
(They also roast their own seaweed here!)
(I really want that roasted seaweed..) Wow, that looks so good
Let's cut up the kimchi
(Looks so emotional...)
Wow, thank you!!
(The owner read her mind hahaha) Roasted seaweed! This is going to taste so good with the kimchi stew!
Can I have a bowl of rice, please?
It comes with the soy sauce like this
The owner gave it to me to eat with the roasted seaweed
Let's dip it in
It's been so long, tastes so good

(Excited and thrilled) Wow, looks delicious
Let's try the kimchi in the stew
I was right!
This kimchi itself is delicious!!
(Cannot fail) The kimchi in Jeolla Province is really good
It's so delicious
The meat is so soft
The meat in this kimchi stew is very tender
Amazing
She can finish all this?????
(How's that possible??)
(Time for the pork belly!) Let's try some pork belly!
Bon appétit!
(A flood of happiness...)
So good
Pork belly also comes in different flavors

But this one is like
I entered any pork belly place without a thought
(This place is my to-go!) but happened to find the tastiest pork belly
The meat isn't too tough, it's chewy
It's so good!
Let's quickly grill it!!
(Put the grilled ones aside...)
(The grill is being restlessly filled up...)
(Packed)
Looks delicious
Let's get some chives
Wow, this meat looks delicious!
(It adds flavors!) And the chives and ssamjang that go with it are tasty, too
With this roasted seaweed
(Let's add the pork belly!)
Dip it in the soy sauce

So good
(Better than I expected!)
This tastes good with roasted seaweed, too
Dip it in
(A full bowl of kimchi stew...!)
I can't let the stew boil down!
This kimchi...
This kimchi stew is really good!
Wow, it's nicely grilled
When thin pork belly is grilled too much,
I find it hard and not that good
(Thick, moist pork belly...!) But in the case of thick pork belly,
(Thick, moist pork belly...!) it doesn't turn hard, so it's so good
Rice, rice, rice, rice
(White rice is here) White rice is the best
(A bite of meat on rice...!)

(The taste that makes her eyes roll)
Get a spoonful of rice
onto the roasted seaweed
(+ Kimchi from the stew) Add this on!
That's delicious
(Picking out the meat)
More! More!
(By Tzuyang) Do not let your meat go dry
Looking at you eat makes my mouth water!!
It's really delicious!!
The kimchi stew and pork belly are both delicious
(So thankful and impressed...)
Eat slowly!! You'll choke
But I'm hungry!!
It's so good...!!
(The time that made her this hungry...)

(Why are there napkins there?)
This sauce has sugar in it
so it adds a nice texture!
Let's move this forward
The meat is endless!
(Questioning the amount of 10 servings...) If I grill this much, it should disappear pretty quickly
(What a one-person table looks like from her perspective...)
(And the owner that is watching her...)
What do you use for the stew? Broth or water?
(Refill the kimchi stew that disappeared) Do you have some broth that I can add here?
(Brings it quickly)
Thank you
(Back to 2 servings of kimchi stew...)
(Is the pork belly done?)
(Then add new ones)
The meat itself tastes good, but

you know I don't eat meat with rice, right?
(The flavor that changed her taste) But you have to eat them together here
(Pork belly that tastes better with rice!) then it tastes twice as good
(Finally done with one plate!)
(The pork belly is a part of her now...) My hand is full of grease
The food is so good, ma'am
I think your producer looks hungry
Watching you makes me this hungry, too!!!
I'm jealous of her, how can she stay so skinny?
Oh! Let's change this!
(How can this get full? LOL) I think this paper cup is going to overflow!
I'll do it!
(She's like the Mensa of food...) Push this to the side and place this here
(Satisfied) Nice
Actually, before I came here,
I had some trouble

I was looking for a restaurant for 3 hours
I visited three or four of them
(Closed today) One was closed today
One was out of business
One was out of ingredients
That's how I ended up here
(Destiny...) I think I'm quite lucky
(Her producer is starving to death)
Is it done?!
(About to go crazy) I can't stand it anymore
I'll just... take the hate comments...
(The producer has lost his mind...) It's necessary once in a while
Just order a bowl of rice!
(Sounds like a great idea) Excuse me, can I have one rice?
(LOLOL)
I hope the viewers understand today

Yeah, but seriously!
(What he did today: filming, meeting, driving, starving the whole day) We met at 7 in the morning
- (Here's the rice) - And now it's...
(This is for him...) Not me...
It's almost midnight
15...
(Going crazy)
You went through a harsh day...
(Camera 4 is on break... Please enjoy the food)
Let's grill more quickly
This place is so delicious!!
I told you!
(His hands are going quite wild)
(LOLOL)
So delicious
(Even the producer is enjoying the food)

Wow, this place is...
a famous eatery between celebrities!
(The taste that spread among celebrities) Apparently some of them visited yesterday, too
(Let's put them on the side)
I had to change her grill twice or three times by now...
But she never changed even once...
Why do I have to change it?
(She changed it because the grills are burned!) The meat might turn black and burn!
Hehe
After filming years of mukbang...
(She reached the mastery of mukbang...!) I've learned some passive skills...
(Two plates of meat finally onto the grill)
She gave you a bit more!
Apparently she gave you more!
- Really? - I gave you more to cheer you up
(How did she really know...?) No wonder, this seemed a bit too much for 2kg

I'm quite accurate with measurements
Really?
I gave you two more handfuls haha
Two more handfuls?!?!?!
(+ This is from my heart) She must gave you two more servings
(Sincerely) Thank you!!
(+ Pork belly) Get it on there
(+ Ssamjang) You too
(And then she went back to eating...)
(She leaves for a bit to take a call..)
Are you a YouTuber??
Oh, she's Tzuyang?!
(I'm a real fan!!) I subscribed to her channel
(She's back...) She's back! Check if it's really her!
Oh, it's really you?!
(Why's she here...??)

(He can't hide his excitement) Wow, amazing!
Am I dreaming?!?!?!
(This is not a dream...) Wow, Tzuyang!
(Another day of leaving memories with pictures!)
She must be famous?
She's more famous than celebrities
- (Seriously?) - No, that's not true
(He can't keep in his excitement)
Since you're famous, let me take one too
(He's about to fly off haha) One, two, three
(He doesn't know Tzuyang) But even if you eat that much,
the fact that you can stay fit
is not something easy to do...
I don't gain easily haha...
In the Jeolla Province, we say...
how can you be so gorgeous!!?

(Eats like a horse, and yet gorgeous...)
How many did you eat now???
I ate about 11~12 servings of meat
with 2 servings of kimchi stew
(1 bowl of rice, 6 bottles of drinks) A bowl of rice and some drinks...
(She did it once again...)
(This is her 2nd round of mukbang) I actually already filmed one already earlier
That's why I'm eating quite light right now...
How's that a light meal?!
That's a light meal?!?!
(Oh, she's Tzuyang, indeed...)
(She even orders more) One more bowl of rice, please
(Perfect performance for the subscriber)
Even she doesn't know, but how do you know?
How do you not know Tzuyang?!
I mean, she has so many subscribers!!!

- (LOLOL) - (LOLOLOL)
(Tzuyang ambassador) Search 'Tzuyang' on YouTube!!!
Tzuyang x2
How do you not know her?
(Found her channel!) I found it
(Watching the Pyongyang cold noodle episode...) Pyongyang cold noodles
(Watching the video / Watching live)
I accidentally burned it cuz I turned up the heat
(Along with meat + kimchi stew) I think I have one serving left now
(The perfect midnight snack, perfect all the way through...!!) This tastes amazing until the end
Why aren't you eating?
(The ambassador hasn't touched his food for 20 minutes...) I'll eat now...
She's the living legend of mukbang
(Cough)
Oh, no way...
There are a lot of mukbang YouTubers, right now

But she's basically the legend
(She's can't possibly stay sane from the word legend)
(The legend...?)
(Calms down and resumes eating...) I'm going to tell everyone tomorrow morning
(Glares)
She even eats so pretty!
Right?
(LOLOL The legend is shy)
Thank you...
(After slurping the last bit of stew...)
(Gwangju 'Geumsung Restaurant' ALL CLEAR!)
I ate so well!
(Light(?) midnight snack finished at 12 AM)
Wow, I really ate so well!
(Applauds)
It was a great decision to come here

I really enjoyed today's midnight snack
Thanks for the meal today!
I really enjoyed the food
Wow, you ate everything up
Absolutely amazing
- Are you Tzuyang?! - Do you know me?
- I only watch your channel - Really?
Thank you
You should revisit Gwangju again
One, two, three
She drank 7 bottles of soda
You have to drink the plum drink!!
(Dear thoughtful citizens of Gwangju) I actually own a market nearby, if I knew you were here,
(Thank you very much) I could've brought you some plum drinks
